findings.message: plugin.json declares version 0.4.0 but package.json and server.ts MCP registration both declare 0.1.0; tooling that correlates these will see inconsistent versions.
plugin.json (0.4.0) and package.json/server.ts (0.1.0) track versions independently; the public plugin version has diverged from the npm package version.
'--shell=bun' arg routes npm script execution through Bun's built-in shell rather than /bin/sh.
Auto-installs qrcode-terminal via Bun.spawnSync if node_modules is missing; same supply-chain risk as the package.json start script finding.
start script runs 'bun install' on every MCP server launch, resolving and downloading dependencies at runtime rather than at install time, creating a supply-chain window.
@modelcontextprotocol/sdk uses '^1.0.0' and qrcode-terminal uses '^0.12.0'; caret ranges allow unreviewed minor/patch version bumps on each install.
Bash(ls *) declared in allowed-tools but no ls invocation appears in any documented step.
'gracefully' is a vague quantifier in 'handle ENOENT gracefully'; the expected fallback (return default Access object) should be stated explicitly.
Bash(mkdir *) declared in allowed-tools but no mkdir invocation appears in any configure step; directory creation is delegated to bun scripts.
'complete picture' is a vague quantifier in 'give the user a complete picture'; the numbered list below already specifies the content concretely.
Bash(ls *) declared in allowed-tools but no ls invocation appears in any documented step.
